metadata.title: Airport taxi — Stockholm, Arlanda & Skavsta | Sahotra Services AB
metadata.description: Fixed-price rides to and from Stockholm, Arlanda (ARN), and Skavsta Airport. 24/7 booking, professional drivers, premium environment-friendly vehicles.

site.brandTitle: Taxi to or from Stockholm to Arlanda and Skavsta Airport
site.description: Premium rides across Stockholm and Arlanda. Reliable airport transfers, city trips, and more. Fixed prices, 24/7 booking, professional drivers — a project of Sahotra Services AB.
site.vehicleTagline: Premium, environment‑friendly vehicles — comfortable rides with lower environmental impact.
site.vastervasOffer: Västerås ↔ Arlanda / Stockholm — 1000 SEK fixed price

hero.mastheadKicker: No Fixed Price — No Hidden Fees
hero.mastheadSubheading: Experience trusted, luxury travel in Stockholm with a service defined by punctuality, discretion, and professionalism where every journey is smooth, every detail is refined, and your comfort is always the priority.

bookYourRide.title: Book Your Ride
bookYourRide.subtitle: Choose your service and get instant booking
bookYourRide.name: Name
bookYourRide.footerTrust: Fixed price. No surge. All inclusive.
bookYourRide.faq1q: Will the driver wait for my flight?
bookYourRide.faq1a: Yes. We track arrivals and adjust pickup time if you're delayed — no extra stress after landing.
bookYourRide.faq2a: The price you see is what you pay — no surge pricing or hidden fees for airport transfers.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p: We collect information you provide when booking a ride, including your name, email address, phone number, pickup and drop-off locations, and any special instructions. This information is used solely to provide our taxi services and improve your experience.
privacy.s2p: Your information is used to process bookings, communicate with you about your ride, and ensure driver coordination. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.s3p: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.s4p: For questions about this privacy policy or your data, contact us at {phone} or via our contact form.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1p: {company} provides premium taxi and transfer services in the Stockholm region, including Arlanda and Skavsta airport routes. Our services include airport transfers, city tours, and custom route bookings. All prices displayed are fixed and in Swedish Kronor (SEK).
terms.s2p: Bookings are confirmed upon submission. We recommend cancelling at least 24 hours in advance for airport transfers. Late cancellations may incur fees as specified at the time of booking.
terms.s3p: Our standard service covers routes up to 47 km. For longer distances, please contact us directly for a custom quote.
terms.s4p: We are not liable for delays caused by circumstances beyond our control, including traffic, weather, or flight delays. We strive to provide accurate pickup estimates and will communicate any significant changes.
terms.s5p: For support or questions about these terms, contact us at {phone} or via WhatsApp.
